name: Create part with initial stock by checking the Create Initial Stock checkbox
steps:
Given the 'Create Initial Stock' global setting is enabled
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Create Part'
When the user enters 'Capacitor 100nF' in the 'Part Name' field
When the user checks the 'Create Initial Stock' checkbox in the Initial Stock section
When the user enters '50' in the initial stock quantity field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part 'Capacitor 100nF' is created and the Stock tab shows a stock item with quantity 50

name: Create Initial Stock section is hidden when Create Initial Stock setting is disabled
steps:
Given the 'Create Initial Stock' global setting is disabled
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Create Part'
Then the part creation form does not display an 'Initial Stock' section

name: Create Initial Stock section is visible when Create Initial Stock setting is enabled
steps:
Given the 'Create Initial Stock' global setting is enabled
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Create Part'
Then the part creation form displays an 'Initial Stock' section with a 'Create Initial Stock' checkbox
